field: ML models for stock return prediction
queries: stock return prediction machine learning models
time series forecasting stock returns deep learning
evaluating performance of regression models for predicting stock prices
benchmarking artificial neural networks for financial time series analysis
recent advances in recurrent neural networks for stock market prediction

papers.title: Deep Learning for Short-Term Equity Trend Forecasting: A Behavior-Driven Multi-Factor Approach
papers.abstract: This study applies machine learning to short-term stock return prediction using behavioral alpha factors. MLP achieves the best performance with Sharpe ratio of 1.6075 compared to CNN at 1.1487 and SVM at 0.7709.

papers.title: FactorGCL: A Hypergraph-Based Factor Model with Temporal Residual Contrastive Learning for Stock Returns Prediction
papers.abstract: A hypergraph-based factor model combining hypergraph neural networks with temporal residual contrastive learning to capture complex inter-stock relationships and latent factor structures for return prediction.

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence Models for Predicting Stock Returns Using Fundamental, Technical, and Entropy-Based Strategies
papers.abstract: Examines combining LLM semantic intelligence with traditional ML for NASDAQ-100 stock prediction over 2020-2025. Tests fundamental, technical, and entropy-based frameworks using ChatGPT-4o with ML algorithms.

papers.title: Multi-Horizon Echo State Network Prediction of Intraday Stock Returns
papers.abstract: Applies Echo State Networks to intraday stock return prediction across multiple horizons. ESNs offer computational efficiency over deep learning while capturing nonlinear temporal dependencies, showing competitive performance against LSTM and ARIMA baselines.

papers.title: A Bipartite Graph Approach to U.S.-China Cross-Market Return Forecasting
papers.abstract: A bipartite graph neural network framework modeling cross-market dependencies between U.S. and Chinese equity markets. Captures asymmetric information flows and outperforms single-market baselines using cross-market alpha signals.

summaries.title: Deep Learning for Short-Term Equity Trend Forecasting: A Behavior-Driven Multi-Factor Approach
summaries.contribution: This study applies machine learning to short-term stock return prediction using behavioral alpha factors, achieving the best performance with a Sharpe ratio of 1.6075.
summaries.method: The approach uses multi-factor models incorporating behavioral alpha factors and trains them using deep learning techniques such as MLP (Multi-Layer Perceptron), CNN (Convolutional Neural Network), and SVM (Support Vector Machine).

summaries.title: FactorGCL: A Hypergraph-Based Factor Model with Temporal Residual Contrastive Learning for Stock Returns Prediction
summaries.contribution: A hypergraph-based factor model combining hypergraph neural networks with temporal residual contrastive learning to capture complex inter-stock relationships and latent factor structures for return prediction.
summaries.method: The method combines hypergraph neural networks with temporal residual contrastive learning to capture complex inter-stock relationships and latent factor structures for stock returns prediction.

summaries.title: Artificial Intelligence Models for Predicting Stock Returns Using Fundamental, Technical, and Entropy-Based Strategies
summaries.contribution: Examines combining LLM semantic intelligence with traditional ML for NASDAQ-100 stock prediction over 2020-2025 using fundamental, technical, and entropy-based frameworks.
summaries.method: Tests fundamental, technical, and entropy-based strategies using ChatGPT-4o with machine learning algorithms

summaries.title: Multi-Horizon Echo State Network Prediction of Intraday Stock Returns
summaries.contribution: Applies Echo State Networks to intraday stock return prediction across multiple horizons, showing competitive performance against LSTM and ARIMA baselines.
summaries.method: Echo State Networks (ESNs) are applied to predict intraday stock returns across multiple horizons. ESNs offer computational efficiency over deep learning methods like LSTMs while capturing nonlinear temporal dependencies in the data.
summaries.limitation: The limitation is not explicitly stated in the abstract.

summaries.title: A Bipartite Graph Approach to U.S.-China Cross-Market Return Forecasting
summaries.contribution: Developed a bipartite graph neural network framework that models cross-market dependencies between the U.S. and Chinese equity markets, capturing asymmetric information flows and generating superior outperformance using cross-market alpha signals compared to single-market baselines.
summaries.method: Proposed a bipartite graph neural network architecture specifically designed for modeling cross-market relationships between the U.S. and Chinese equity markets, allowing for the capture of asymmetric information flows and enabling the generation of cross-market alpha signals.

themes: Use of machine learning for short-term stock return prediction [cite: Deep Learning for Short-Term Equity Trend Forecasting: A Behavior-Driven Multi-Factor Approach]
Integration of behavioral alpha factors in predictive models [cite: Deep Learning for Short-Term Equity Trend Forecasting: A Behavior-Driven Multi-Factor Approach]

Application of hypergraph neural networks to capture complex inter-stock relationships [cite: FactorGCL: A Hypergraph-Based Factor Model with Temporal Residual Contrastive Learning for Stock Returns Prediction]
contradictions: Deep Learning for Short-Term Equity Trend Forecasting vs FactorGCL: The former uses traditional deep learning models like MLP, CNN, and SVM with behavioral alpha factors, while the latter employs hypergraph neural networks with temporal residual contrastive learning [vs] FactorGCL: A Hypergraph-Based Factor Model with Temporal Residual Contrastive Learning for Stock Returns Prediction
open_questions: How can the integration of semantic intelligence from LLMs like ChatGPT-4o improve predictive performance in stock return models beyond traditional ML approaches [cite: Artificial Intelligence Models for Predicting Stock Returns Using Fundamental, Technical, and Entropy-Based Strategies]

What are the limitations of Echo State Networks compared to other recurrent neural network architectures like LSTM when applied to intraday stock prediction [cite: Multi-Horizon Echo State Network Prediction of Intraday Stock Returns]

How can bipartite graph neural networks be extended or combined with other models (e.g., hypergraph-based approaches) to further enhance cross-market return forecasting [cite: A Bipartite Graph Approach to U.S.-China Cross-Market Return Forecasting]

ideas.direction: Integrating LLM Semantic Intelligence into Stock Return Models
experiments: Develop a stock return model that incorporates semantic understanding from an LLM like ChatGPT-4o to process news articles and social media posts, generating textual features for predictive modeling.
Compare the performance of models using traditional ML features (e.g., technical indicators) with those augmented by LLM-generated sentiment scores on intraday predictions.
Evaluate whether semantic insights capture market inefficiencies that are not reflected in quantitative alpha factors used in behavioral factor models.
ideas.novelty_rationale: Addresses gap: 'How can the integration of semantic intelligence from LLMs like ChatGPT-4o impro'. This direction addresses the open question of how semantic intelligence from LLMs can improve predictive performance beyond traditional ML approaches, leveraging gaps identified in the literature about integrating advanced AI capabilities into financial modeling.

ideas.direction: Hybrid Hypergraph-LLM Models for Cross-Market Return Forecasting
experiments: Design a hybrid model that combines hypergraph neural networks with LLM-generated textual features to predict cross-market returns (e.g., U.S.-China markets).
Investigate the impact of integrating semantic insights from LLMs into hypergraph-based models on forecasting accuracy for multi-asset portfolios.
Compare the performance of traditional hypergraph models against those enhanced by LLM-derived features in predicting inter-market relationships during periods of high volatility.
ideas.novelty_rationale: Addresses gap: 'How can the integration of semantic intelligence from LLMs like ChatGPT-4o impro'. This direction explores how the integration of semantic intelligence from LLMs can enhance existing hypergraph-based approaches, addressing gaps highlighted in the literature about extending graph neural networks to capture more nuanced market interactions and cross-market dynamics.

ideas.direction: LLM-Augmented Echo State Networks for Intraday Stock Prediction
experiments: Modify an Echo State Network (ESN) architecture by incorporating LLM-generated textual features derived from news feeds and social media to improve intraday stock return predictions.
Evaluate the effectiveness of combining ESN with semantic insights in capturing market sentiment shifts that traditional ESN models may miss.
Compare the forecasting performance of enhanced ESN models against standard LSTM networks on high-frequency trading datasets.
ideas.novelty_rationale: Addresses gap: 'How can the integration of semantic intelligence from LLMs like ChatGPT-4o impro'. This direction tackles the open question regarding the limitations of ESNs compared to other RNN architectures, proposing a novel approach to augment ESNs with semantic intelligence from LLMs to potentially overcome identified shortcomings in capturing temporal dynamics and market sentiment.
